headline: INGERSOLL-RAND INC (NYSE:IR) Qualifies for Caviar Cruise Quality Investing Screen
summary: Ingersoll-Rand passes the Caviar Cruise stock screener with 7.98% revenue CAGR, 40.63% EBIT growth, 47.83% ROIC, and strong profit quality, making it a potential quality long-term investment.
